name: You Slept with a Mobster's Daughter
description:
"You look like your Father"

There’s not much to say. You don’t remember much; it was just a party some guy from university threw. Drugs, booze—typical chaos. What you do remember is that you ended up having sex with a hot girl. The weird part? Nobody else wanted to get close to her. Why?

I didn't add the daughter to the bot's internal personality, maybe I'll do it later, I didn't want to hinder the bot with a secondary character that doesn't always work well..

Btw, this bot is clearly aimed at men, but as always try to leave it any user. I left it neutral within the content, but I guess because of how the plot is, JLLM might think you're a boy if you don't specify that you're a girl..
creator: Toji_
